message:
feat(e2e): add safety posture panel and API tests (bd-3qs0)

- Add comprehensive E2E tests for Safety Posture feature
- Test coverage includes:
  - Dashboard integration (header, status pill, refresh)
  - Tool status cards (DCG, SLB, UBS)
  - Integrity verification (ACFS checksums)
  - Issues display with recommendations
  - Quick links navigation
  - API endpoints (/api/safety/posture, /tools, /checksums)
  - Error states and responsiveness
- 37 tests following established Playwright patterns
- Close bd-3qs0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
